command: node --test --test-name-pattern "VQG-S|pr prepare requires Visual QA" test/vibepro-cli.test.js

observed.visual_qa_fallback: current verification evidence accepted only with visual_qa and screenshot markers
observed.residual_gate: existing residual QA remains authoritative before verification fallback
observed.stale_binding: stale or dirty verification evidence is rejected
observed.marker_classification: visual_qa screenshot accessibility_evidence markers are classified explicitly

scenarios: VQG-S-1: missing Visual QA evidence blocks pr prepare
VQG-S-2: current explicit visual_qa and screenshot verification evidence satisfies Visual QA gate
VQG-S-3: stale verification evidence does not satisfy Visual QA gate
VQG-S-4: residual QA evidence remains authoritative before verification fallback
VQG-S-5: visual_qa, screenshot, and accessibility_evidence markers are classified
